narrative_beat: Close-up extremo de um unico olho aberto ocupando 80% do frame, pupila refletindo cidade em chamas, foreground cores ricas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a single human eye in extreme macro filling 80% of the frame, iris rich amber-gold with crimson veins, the pupil dilated and reflecting a tiny detailed burning city skyline with orange flames and smoke columns visible in the glossy corneal reflection, eyelashes sharp and detailed, skin around the eye lit warm amber
subject.focal_point: the burning city reflected in the pupil
subject.secondary: visible skin pores and fine wrinkles around the eye, a single tear forming at the lower lid

environment.location: extreme macro — the eye IS the environment
environment.time_of_day: lit by the fire reflected in the eye
environment.atmosphere: final witness, you now carry the knowledge

composition.foreground: the eye filling the frame in warm amber, gold, and crimson tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white darkness at the extreme edges of frame

lighting.key_light: warm amber fire glow reflecting off the cornea from the burning city
lighting.fill_light: faint gold illumination on the iris from the flames
lighting.rim_light: gold highlight along the upper eyelid and lash line
lighting.shadow_quality: deep shadows in the eye socket and around the orbital bone

style.post_processing: halation around the fire reflection, crushed blacks, amber highlights, subtle anamorphic flare in corneal reflection
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, individual eyelash hairs, iris fiber detail, visible corneal reflection of burning city, skin pore texture

mood.emotion: you are now a conscious witness — you cannot unsee this

symbolism.primary: the eye as the final receiver of truth — the burning city is already inside you
symbolism.secondary: the forming tear as the cost of knowledge

negative_as_positive: anonymous eye with no identifiable facial features beyond the eye itself
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated edges, vivid warm tones concentrated on the iris and reflection
tack-sharp focus on iris texture and pupil reflection

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
